content.full_text:
November 19, 1976

Mr. Herbert R. Kameon
President
National Coalition for Marine Conservation
1054 South Robertson Blvd.
Los Angeles, California 90035

Dear Mr. Kameon:

     Enclosed for your review are the Instruction Manual for Lobbyists, the Instruction Manual for Form 650 and the appropriate forms.

     If you have any futher questions regarding your filing requirements please contact me.

Sincerely,


Rich Eichman
Compliance Representative

RE:bw

Enclosure

bcc:  Jeanne P.

[illegible] aser .or rodmovov

normal .in rindrysii .in
snobianrf
nofvrosocnod anlbgm-rot nogifs[illegible] [illegible] laoparan
.bivld noed[illegible]or nldoe i[illegible]
ssnoc ,slmslao [illegible] sonsiansi aor

srosmsnei .in srsn

ros [illegible] sdoL[illegible]rssnsr sis srs wslvos inoy ror bsmollsnn
-osass sis nsb oto srow ror [illegible] noifsurtsdi sis ,[illegible]
smnsoi sislrs

smilss inoy nrilsxrsot snofsrsnys [illegible]sis svsn soy si
.snr losilnos ssblri s[illegible]rssilslps

.yroessmls

nsmmsls noM
svisidnossfossM semlfrssods

ydsdn
srinsoinnd

.r.s.nnsof rsnd .r

FPPC
Nov 18 11:13 AM '76

National Coalition for Marine Conservation - Pacific Region
1054 SOUTH ROBERTSON BOULEVARD
LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA 90035
TELEPHONE: (213) 657-3342

16 November 1976


The Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 K Street
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Sirs:

We are a volunteer political organization. We intend
to raise and spend money for the purpose of influencing
the actions of the Fish & Game Commission in the enact-
ment of regulations relating to the conservation of
ocean fish.

Please send such information and forms as we will need
in order to comply with the requirements of the California
Fair Political Practices Act.

Sincerely,

Herbert R. Kameon
President

HRK:rlb

"Let us face in time the fact that the ocean can be destroyed"
THOR HEYERDAHL
